title: Dig Django Todo Application
description: A modern, robust, and responsive Todo application built with Django and Bootstrap 5. It features secure user authentication, private task lists, and demonstrates advanced database management with PostgreSQL, including data migration. Includes a guest demo mode and a responsive UI.

title: Hareesh Lotti
description: A unique, cyberpunk-themed portfolio website featuring neural network animations, terminal-style interface, and cutting-edge interactive elements.

title: Insurance Premium API
description: Production-ready FastAPI service delivering machine learning predictions for insurance costs.

title: LangGraph ChatBot
description: Advanced AI conversational agent built with LangGraph for complex task orchestration and state management.

title: MCPs Collection
description: Implementation of Model Context Protocols (MCP) for standardizing AI context and tools.

title: ML From Scratch
description: Comprehensive collection of Machine Learning projects and foundational notes, complete with datasets, trained models, and detailed explanations.

title: Medical Ask-Chatbot
description: RAG-powered medical assistance chatbot answering health queries using LangChain and FAISS.

title: Pneumonia-Detection
description: A deep learning project implementing a custom 5-layer CNN in TensorFlow/Keras to classify pediatric chest X-rays as 'Normal' or 'Pneumonia'. The model achieves 90.4% accuracy on unseen test data, addressing challenges like class imbalance through data augmentation and adaptive learning rates, demonstrating strong potential as a diagnostic aid.

title: Quora Question Pairs Semantic Similarity
description: Determines if two questions are semantically similar using NLP techniques and a machine learning pipeline. Features a robust preprocessing pipeline, 15+ engineered numerical features, a Random Forest classifier (F1-score: 0.82), and an interactive Streamlit web application for real-time predictions.

title: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) with LangChain
description: An implementation of Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) using the LangChain framework, demonstrating how to build LLM applications that can query and synthesize information from custom data sources to provide accurate and context-aware responses.

title: STAC Manager
description: A professional, modular Streamlit application for managing SpatioTemporal Asset Catalogs (STAC). It automates the workflow of converting satellite imagery to Cloud-Optimized GeoTIFFs (COG), generating metadata-rich STAC items, and pushing them to a central API, featuring real-time service health monitoring and a guided user experience.

title: StudyBud — Collaborative Study Platform
description: A full-featured, real-time collaborative study platform built with Django where users can create and join study rooms, discuss topics, and connect with fellow learners.

title: CNN Lab
description: Experiments with different Convolutional Neural Network architectures.

title: Cyberattack Detection
description: Anomaly detection in network traffic using machine learning classifiers.

title: Data Analysis Essentials
description: Numpy, Pandas, and visualization basics for aspiring data scientists.

title: Data Analysis Hub
description: Exploratory data analysis on diverse datasets with complex visualizations.

title: Deep Learning Collection
description: Repository of various deep learning models and research implementations.

title: Dig Django Guide
description: In-depth learning resources and projects for mastering the Django ecosystem.

title: Email Spam Classifier
description: Binary classification model to identify promotional or spam emails using NLP.

title: Expense Tracker MCP
description: Model Context Protocol server for automated expense tracking and auditing.

title: FastAPI Boilerplate
description: High-performance API templates and ready-to-use backend structures.

title: Football Field Segmentation
description: Computer vision system for detecting and segmenting play areas in sports video.

title: LangChain Lab
description: Basic building blocks and chain implementations for LLM apps.

title: LangGraph Core
description: Fundamental experiments and patterns for stateful agent workflows.

title: Langsmith Experiments
description: Exploring LLM observability and evaluation using LangSmith.

title: Logic Type
description: Gamified typing experience designed to improve coding reflex and accuracy.

title: Mining Manager
description: Automation and resource monitoring system for mining operations.

title: PyTorch Deep Learning Examples
description: A foundational repository showcasing implementations and explorations within the PyTorch deep learning framework. Demonstrates proficiency in designing, training, and evaluating neural network models for various AI applications.

title: Stable Chatbot
description: Industrial-grade chatbot shell with robust deployment scripts.

title: Stark Careers Website
description: Developed a careers website for Stark, showcasing a Python Flask application with proper dependency management via `requirements.txt`. The project is configured for deployment on the Render platform, utilizing Gunicorn for a production-ready server environment.

title: Stark Careers Website
description: A Python Flask-based careers website for 'Stark', designed for production deployment on the Render platform. This project demonstrates best practices for deploying Flask applications, utilizing gunicorn as a production-ready WSGI server.

title: YouTube Video Analyzer
description: A project focused on extracting, processing, and analyzing data from YouTube videos to derive insights into performance metrics, trends, and content characteristics.
